testcase.name: test_get_completed_reminders_history

failure.message: AssertionError: Reminder None should be completed assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb6950ebd00>('is_completed') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb6950ebd00> = {'customer_code': 'VMP-0003', 'days_overdue': 13, 'doctor_id': '4131c6c0-9c1b-4ef4-a540-6834cbe1cb77', 'doctor_name': 'Dr.HHH', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_customers_crud.py:245: in test_get_completed_reminders_history assert rem.get('is_completed') == True, f"Reminder {rem.get('id')} should be completed" E AssertionError: Reminder None should be completed E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb6950ebd00>('is_completed') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdb6950ebd00> = {'customer_code': 'VMP-0003', 'days_overdue': 13, 'doctor_id': '4131c6c0-9c1b-4ef4-a540-6834cbe1cb77', 'doctor_name': 'Dr.HHH', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_mark_reminder_complete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_customers_crud.py:302: in test_mark_reminder_complete reminder_id = reminder['id'] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'

testcase.name: test_get_followup_history
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_customers_crud.py:417: in test_get_followup_history assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get follow-up history: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get follow-up history: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
